shadow_event.query: 为什么 codex插件里是 486k，你给的是258k？

transcript.content: 点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；
这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
我已经把这个问题修到根上了。 根因不是 node 路径了，而是状态栏刷新走了完整 GC 判定链路，导致扩展里看起来像“点击没反应 / 刷新失败”。现在我把状态栏和详情窗口改成了 `host-only fast path`：
为什么 codex插件里是 486k，你给的是258k？
因为我这里的监控脚本把窗口上限 `主动 clamp 到了 258k`，而 Codex 插件显示的是它自己上报的 `reported model_context_window`，大约 `486k`。 代码里就是这么写的：

decision.archive_summary: Earlier subtopics were resolved: status-bar click latency/no response, meaning of `Ctx: error`, and two concrete refresh-failure command-path incidents (`Code Helper (Plugin)` and `/usr/local/bin/node`). The conversation then narrowed to the current discrepancy question: Codex plugin shows about 486k because it reports the model's `reported model_context_window`, while the assistant-side monitor was clamped to about 258k.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest turn stays automatically. The active topic is still the same context-size discrepancy, so `continue` fits. Older troubleshooting threads are resolved and are not needed as raw evidence for the next turn. No durable user preference or rule from these turns needs a semantic pin.

applied.archiveSummary: Earlier subtopics were resolved: status-bar click latency/no response, meaning of `Ctx: error`, and two concrete refresh-failure command-path incidents (`Code Helper (Plugin)` and `/usr/local/bin/node`). The conversation then narrowed to the current discrepancy question: Codex plugin shows about 486k because it reports the model's `reported model_context_window`, while the assistant-side monitor was clamped to about 258k.
applied.reasoningSummary: The latest turn stays automatically. The active topic is still the same context-size discrepancy, so `continue` fits. Older troubleshooting threads are resolved and are not needed as raw evidence for the next turn. No durable user preference or rule from these turns needs a semantic pin.
